name: rad-code-review
description: 3-role adversarial code review optimized for Claude Opus 4.7 (Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5 compatible). Parallel tool-call pipeline, JSON-first subagent output, compaction-safe checkpointing with --resume, and --non-interactive mode for agents/CI. Blame-aware diff scoping, 14-pattern AI slop detection, framework-specific IDOR (Next.js/Express/Fastify/Django/Rails/Go), WCAG 2.2 + dynamic ARIA state detection, performance profiling heuristics, severity-ranked findings with release verdict, accepted-risk expiry enforcement. Includes a code-reviewer agent for proactive autonomous review.
